message:
test(fcp-conformance/transport-selector): pin TransportSelector routing-decision priority/policy/multipath contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-tr5ih)

25 tests covering the cross-crate routing primitive every MeshNode
calls to choose a transport for peer-bound symbols. Zero prior
conformance coverage despite NORMATIVE priority order.

- Priority constants Direct=4 > Mesh=3 > Derp=2 > Funnel=1 pinned via
  observable RankedPath.priority field
- transport_mode mapping: Direct/Mesh→Lan, Derp→Derp, Funnel→Funnel
  (Direct+Mesh share Lan toggle in ZoneTransportPolicy)
- rank_paths deterministic sort key chain: eligible desc → priority
  desc → estimated_rtt_ms asc (None=u32::MAX) → path_id asc → peer asc
- Policy refusal carries specific DecisionReasonCode:
  TransportLanForbidden / TransportDerpForbidden / TransportFunnelForbidden
- best_path returns highest-priority eligible or None
- select_multipath: fanout=0 → empty, filters ineligible, caps at
  fanout, exhausts higher-priority group before descending,
  deterministic via blake3(object_id || symbol_index || path_id)
  tie-break, yields different orderings across symbol_index values
  (replication actually balances)
- ZoneTransportPolicy::default allows LAN only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
